languages.text: "Как сюда занесло меровцев? Вы смогли пройти Зев?"
"How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"
languages.original_text: "Как сюда занесло меровцев? Вы смогли пройти Зев?"

traits.locale_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"
"How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"
"How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"
"How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンはどのようにここに来たのか？マウの通過は成功したか？」
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

languages.text: "Merovlular buraya nasıl geldi? Ağız'ı geçtiniz mi?"
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

traits.locale_text: "Merovlular buraya nasıl geldi? Ağız'ı geçtiniz mi?"

languages.text: “梅罗夫人怎么来了这里？你们穿过了巨口？”
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

traits.locale_text: “梅罗夫人怎么来了这里？你们穿过了巨口？”

languages.text: "Wie kamen die Merovianer hierher? Ist es Euch gelungen, den Schlund zu überwinden?"
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie kamen die Merovianer hierher? Ist es Euch gelungen, den Schlund zu überwinden?"

languages.text: « Comment les Meroviens sont-ils parvenus jusqu'ici ? Auriez-vous traversé la Gueule ? »
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

traits.locale_text: « Comment les Meroviens sont-ils parvenus jusqu'ici ? Auriez-vous traversé la Gueule ? »

languages.text: «¿Cómo llegaron aquí los merovianos? ¿Lograron atravesar las Fauces?».
languages.original_text: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo llegaron aquí los merovianos? ¿Lograron atravesar las Fauces?».
